en.text: (Aramaic) or (feminine) ; (Aramaic), corresponding to H1931 {he (she or it); self, or (especially with the article) the same; sometimes (as demonstrative) this or that; occasionally (instead of copula) as or are}

senses.gloss_en: (Aramaic) or (feminine) ; (Aramaic), corresponding to H1931 {he (she or it); self, or (especially with the article) the same; sometimes (as demonstrative) this or that; occasionally (instead of copula) as or are}
